"[7] Incident 260212IN0248 was reopened. Comment: Incident Reopened : RP RECALLING , ADV OTHER VEH WITH HER IS YELLING AT HER DEMANDING HER INFO SAYING SHE CAUSED THEM TO HIT HER WHILE SHE WAS RUNNING OVER WOOD DEBRIS [Shared]"

"[6] [Notification] [CHP]-RP HIT WOOD - BLK HYUN TUC - ADDL VEH GRY MERZ SD ALSO HIT IT - MERZ FOLLOWED RP OFF TO SINCLAIR G/S OFF RUBIDOUX - REQ RP INFO STATING SHE CAUSED THE DAMAGES - RP REQ UNIT [Shared]"
